headline: How New Funding, Living Will Approval, and Asian Wealth Push At Citigroup (C) Has Changed Its Investment Story

The combination of clean regulatory feedback, fresh long-dated funding, and expansion into Asian wealth and private credit highlights how Citigroup is reshaping its business mix toward...
